summary: Regression testing completed for refactored backend (server.py split into modular routes). All 28 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly. The refactoring maintains 100% functional parity.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 13,500+ lines to ~120 lines
All 30 route modules properly imported and registered
Background tasks (daily reminders, greetings, monthly ledger, backups) properly initialized
Shared dependencies (db, auth, logger) correctly centralized in deps.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring regression test completed. Key findings: 1) All API endpoints work correctly after refactoring. 2) server.py is now ~120 lines (slim orchestrator). 3) Routes are in /app/backend/routes/*.py (30 files). 4) Utils in /app/backend/utils/*.py. 5) Models in /app/backend/models/schemas.py. 6) Background tasks in background_tasks.py. 7) Shared deps in deps.py. 8) Note: GET /api/followups requires entity_type and entity_id params (e.g., /api/followups/doctor/{id}). 9) GET /api/whatsapp-logs returns {logs: [], total, skip, limit}. 10) GET /api/database/backup-history returns {backups: []}.

Backend API Tests (28 total).GET /api/followups/{entity_type}/{entity: PASS - Returns followup list for entity

Frontend UI Tests.Admin login page: PASS - Loads correctly with email/password form
Frontend UI Tests.Admin dashboard: PASS - Shows stats, customers overview, lead pipeline
Frontend UI Tests.Doctors page: PASS - Shows doctors list with actions
Frontend UI Tests.Marketing page: PASS - Shows campaign creation with recipients
Frontend UI Tests.Reports & Analytics page: PASS - Shows revenue, orders, payments stats
Frontend UI Tests.Settings page (/admin/smtp-settings): PASS - Shows WhatsApp API configs, Database Management

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real
